prompt: Create a warm, romantic anime-style vertical illustration of a tall handsome blond man welcoming the viewer in a rustic fantasy kitchen, shown from mid-torso up and holding out a white plate with both hands. His face is covered by a plain centered square censor block in a skin-tone brown, while his long tousled golden blond hair frames the block and catches the sunlight. He wears a black open-collar shirt with ornate silver embroidery along the collar and placket, sleeves rolled to the forearms, plus a beige apron with shoulder straps, metal rings, and a tied waist. On the plate is exactly one golden folded omurice, glossy and soft, decorated with exactly one red ketchup heart on top and a small green herb garnish at the side. The background is a cozy old-world kitchen with warm afternoon light streaming through one arched window on the left, potted greenery on the sill, a brick hearth glowing on the right, one hanging lantern, exactly two hanging metal pans, wooden shelves, bowls, copper cookware, and a bowl of small red tomatoes near the lower right. Use soft cinematic lighting, detailed painterly linework, delicate highlights, warm amber shadows, shallow depth of field, intimate welcoming composition, high-detail anime illustration, fantasy domestic atmosphere, vertical portrait aspect ratio.
